= gossamer
:description: Project directory

This directory is part of the paint.type project.

== Purpose

Project directory.


As a Level 2 directory (`third_party/gossamer/`), it supports the overall
project structure.

== Purpose of Each Component

Each file in this directory serves a specific purpose.

*Configuration files* define build, test, and deployment parameters.\n
*Documentation files* provide guidance.\n
*Other files* support directory operations.\n

== AI Manifest Structure

* `0.2-AI-MANIFEST.a2ml` (this file) - Level 2 manifest for `third_party/gossamer/`

* Each subdirectory has its own `0.3-AI-MANIFEST.a2ml`
